programmes.show_description: Oibríonn Olmsted a& Witt as lámh a chéile ach níl sé éasca Dot a sháinniú. (Officer Olmsted & State trooper Witt join forces to get to the truth, but Dot isn't so easy to corner.)
Erskine Childers a bhí ina Uachtarán ar Éirinn ó 1973-74 a bheidh faoi chaibidil. (Erskine Childers, President of Ireland from 1973 - 1974, is the focus of this show.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Clár deiridh na sraithe: beidh an Grúpa Ceirde i Ré na nDoirí ag taispeáint a gcuid oibre. (In the final episode, the Grúpa Ceirde in Ré na nDoirí show us their creations.)
Tá Téacs Taistil ar ais! Tugann na taistealaithe aghaidh ar Toronto sa gclár seo. (Téacs Taistil is back! This week, the gang touch down in Toronto.)
Turas i dteannta Ardal O'Hanlon ar oileáin na hÉireann. (Ardal O'Hanlon explores the rich wildlife and vibrant communities of Ireland's island gems.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Samhlaíonn Bréidín go bhfuil sé féin agus Clúmh ar muir. (Tweedy tries to pretend that himself and Fluff are at sea.)
Bí ag gabháil fhoinn le Cody agus é ag spraoi lena dheirfiúr óg. (Sing along as Cody follows his baby sister around.)
Réiltín thuas sa spéir ag lonrú anuas orainn go léir. (Twinkle twinkle little star how I wonder what you are?)
Tá muintir Loop ag fáil faoi réir d'Oíche Chinn Bliana. (It's New Year's Eve and preparations are well underway in the Loop household.)
Ag foghlaim faoi mhonarchana a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about factories today.)
Déanann Pip agus Posy dearmad Frankie a fháil nuair a bhíonn siad ag imirt folach bíog. (While playing hide-and-seek together, Pip and Posy totally forget to find Frankie.)
Is sióg í an cara nua atá ag Cnag ach níl aon duine eile in ann í a fheiceáil. (Crunch finds a new fairy friend that no one else can see.)
Tá plean ag Rip chun an ceann is fearr a fháil ar na mascanna ag úsáid chleití Owlette. (Rip tries to gather feathers from Owlette's wings to let the Wolfies fly.)
Tá Wussywat maraithe leis an teas. Caithfidh sí fuarú. (It's a hot day in the garden and Wussywat really needs to cool down.)
Ba mhaith le Emily agus le Clifford a bheith 'mór'. (Emily Elizabeth and Clifford decide to be "grown ups" and do what they think adults do.)
Baintear geit as na cairde nuair a chroitheann an talamh faoina gcosa. (The friends are frightened by mysterious underground ructions.)
Éiríonn Ginger agus na Piseanna mór le hArbharsáralófas óg atá imithe óna thréad. (A young Cornasaurolophus strays from its herd and befriends Ginger and the Peas.)
Níl Adam agus Lily ag tarraingt le chéile beag ná mór. (Adam and Lily aren't getting along well.)
Faigheann Alice réiltín óir ag an scoil agus déanann sí a seacht míle dícheall tuilleadh a fháil sa mbaile. (Alice gets a gold star at school and she tries to get more at home.)
Tá Alice ag cuimhneamh ar dul ar saoire lena teaghlach. (Alice imagines her family holiday.)
Ní chreideann Oli go bhfuil boinn óir buaite ag a máthair. (Oli the Octopus can't believe the incredible facts she learns about her gold medal winning Mum.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is breá le Lola a bróga snasta dearga ach tá siad róbheag aici. (Lola's favourite red shiny shoes are too small for her.)
Tá ceannaire na léamar goidte ag an gCró-Mháistreas ionas go leanfaidh na léamair eile é. (The Ringmaster steals the leader of a group of lemurs so that the others will follow.)
Tá uibheacha Cásca i bhfolach ag Lola agus caithfidh a cairde iad a aimsiú. (Lola organises an Easter egg hunt for her friends.)
Tá rudaí le deisiú ag athair Angelo sa teach. (Angelo's father has to fix things in the house.)
Tá Peigí Pusach ag iarraidh ar Dhónall a huimhir a chuir ina fhón póca. (Peigí wants Dónall to add her phone number to his contacts.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoin mbogha báistí a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about the rainbow.)
Caithfidh na Blocuimhreacha an uimhir chéanna a bheith ar an dá thaobh de gach droichead le hé a dhéanamh cothrom. (The Numberblocks need to have the same number on each side.)
Beidh spraoi ag na Dathanna in éineacht leis na Clódóirí inniu. (Today, the Colours have fun with the Printing Crew.)
Tugann na Blociontais cúnamh d'Ealaí sruthán a thrasnú ar chlocha cora. (The Wonderblocks help Arty figure out the right directions to cross some stepping-stones.)
Tá Timmy agus Meannán an-tógtha le triantáin. (Timmy and Kid are obsessed with triangles.)
Tá Megan leis an lá a chaitheamh in éineacht lena Daideo Páraic. (Megan is going to spend the day with Daideo Páraic.)
Níl Pip ag iarraidh an cairrín aeir a rinne sé a thabhairt do Posy ar fhaitíos go mbrisfeadh sí é. (Pip won't let Posy have a turn with his flying buggy in case she breaks it.)
Baineann préachán geit as Art. Ní maith leis go bhfuil sé chomh héasca sin é a scanrú. (Art gets startled by a crow and is upset that he scares so easily.)
Ligeann Gobnait uirthi féin gur cat í agus gurb iad a cairde na cait óga atá aici. (Gobnait wants to pretend she's a mother cat and her friends are her little kittens.)
Tá bís ar Mháire agus ar Mhicheál Mac Tíre a seomra féin a bheith acu. (The Wolf Twins are excited to finally get their own room.)
Samhlaíonn Muireann a saol ina tréidlia nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Muireann imagines her life as a vet when she grows up.)
Éiríonn le Zou pictiúr álainn a phéinteáil i ngan fhios dó féin. (By accident Zou manages to paint a lovely picture today.)
Beidh an Méara de Pfeffel ag déanamh moltóireacht ar na gairdíní amárach! (Mayor de Pfeffel will be judging the gardens tomorrow!)
Ar chlár an lae inniu beidh madraí uisce ceolmhara, madraí ag gabhail fhoinn agus damhsóirí den scoth. (Today we'll see otter musicians, canine singers and amazing dancers.)
Máirtín Ó Mainín as Conamara a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín ar an gclár seo. (Máirtín Ó Mainín will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Tá Pápa Eoin Pól a Dó in Miami agus tá Sophia ag iarraidh é a fheiceáil. (When Pope John Paul II visits Miami, Sophia wants to see him.)
Tagann fear ar cuairt a deir go mbíodh sé ag siúl amach le Rose nuair a bhí siad ina ndéagóirí. (A man from St. Olaf visits claiming he dated Rose when they were teenagers.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta, beidh Matt Cranitch, Mick Daly, agus Dónal Murphy sa gclár seo. (Traditional music series presented by Eibhlín de Paor and Breandán Ó Beaglaoich.)
Dúnmharaítear duine de na haíonna ag cóisir bhréigéide. (An unwanted guest is murdered at a costume party.)
Turas i dteannta Ardal O'Hanlon ar oileáin na hÉireann. (Ardal O'Hanlon explores the rich wildlife and vibrant communities of Ireland's island gems.)
Cuireann Paul tús lena thuras ag snámh trasna Loch Ba ar Rannoch Moor. (Paul begins his Grand Tour with a chilly swim across Loch Ba high on Rannoch Moor.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le Louise Morrissey agus buaiteoir Ghlór Tíre 2005, Mark Prouse. (Irish Country music featuring Louise Morrissey and Mark Prouse.)
Tá Kevin agus Christine ina gcónaí in Sydney le fada ach táthar ag cuardach teach nua anois. (Long-time Sydney residents Kevin and Christine are house hunting.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)

Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Lisa Murray agus Caoimhín a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Lisa Murray and Caoimhín rise to the challenge.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Turas ceoil ar an tSionainn le Sharon Shannon & a neacht Caoilinn. (Sharon Shannon and her niece Caoilinn Ní Dhonnabháin start their journey of the River Shannon.)
Feictear athbheochan pholaitiúil De Valera sa dara chuid den tsraith seo. (In part two of this dramatic story, De Valera's political rebirth unfolds.)

programmes.show_name: An Western: Pat Garrett & Billy the Kid
programmes.show_description: Fostaítear Garrett chun a sheanchara Billy the Kid a ghabháil. (Pat Garrett is hired as a lawman to bring down his old friend Billy the Kid.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Leanfaidh an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt follows in the footsteps of Annraoi Ó Liatháin along the River Suir.)
Tabharfar aghaidh ar Ghaillimh, Maigh Eo, Tír Eoghain, an Iarmhí agus Liatroim sa gclár seo. (This week we are in Galway, Mayo, Tyrone, Westmeath and Leitrim.)
Is ag féile cheoil ar Inis Bó Finné a casadh Inni-K agus John Blek ar a chéile den chéad uair. (Inni-K and John Blek. A soulful and vivid musical collaboration.)
In San Fransico maraítear fear poiblíochta raidió mór le rá nuair a athraíonn sé leagan amach atá ar chlár. (A hot-shot San Francisco radio promoter is murdered.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Táthar sa tóir ar an teaghlach is cumasaí in Éirinn. Á chur i láthair ag Síomha Ní Ruairc. (The search for Ireland's most talented family continues. Hosted by Síomha Ní Ruairc.)
Tabharfaidh Siobhán Tim Ní Chonghaile as Cois Fharraige aghaidh ar Mhairéad Nic Eoin as Co. Chiarraí. (We see Siobhán Tim Ní Chonghaile go up against Mairéad Nic Eoin.)
I gclár deireanach na sraithe cloisfidh muid daoine caint ar Elon Musk agus ar dhamhsa cuaille. (In the final episode of the series we discuss pole dancing and Elon Musk.)
Is é Peadar Ó Ceannabháin as Conamara a bheidh sa stiúideo. Peadar Ó Ceannabháin from Conamara sings his favourite songs.

Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Oíche Shamhna atá ann agus níl Ribín bhocht in ann codladh ag  torann aisteach atá ar fud an tí. (It's Halloween night and there are noises to be heard everywhere!)
Bíonn Gecko stromptha sa ngaráiste agus téann Bobby an Bus i bhfostú sa sneachta. (Gecko is freezing in the garage and Bobby the Bus gets stuck in the snow.)
Téann na Carsons chuig an trá ach milleán an drochaimsir an lá orthu. (The bad weather has a big impact on the Carsons' trip to the beach.)
Inniu Lá na Rásaí i gClós na mBalún ach tá na bainbh ag briseadh na rialacha. (It's Race Day at Balloon Barnyard, but the piglets are breaking the rules.)
Tá Sif ag iarraidh a roicéad a thuirlingt ach níl sí ann mar gheall ar shatailít. (Sif's coming in for a landing at the rocket launch site until her rocket is pushed off course.)
Nuair a bhriseann meaisín hataí Lloyd, tosaíonn hataí ag titim as an spéir! (It is raining hats on Pretty Big City!)
Téann cnámharlaigh ar iarraidh as an músaem agus is ar na Coileáin a chuirtear an milleán. (Skeletons are stolen from the museum, the PJ Masks think the Wolfies are the culprits.)
Ba bhreá le Finny a bheith ina Sár-Shiorc nuair a bheidh sí mór! (Finny wants to be the superhero Wonder Shark one day!)
Tá Roy dubh dóite ach cuireann Caitríona spionnadh ann lena cuid damhsa. (Roy is bored, but Caitríona is here to cheer him up with a fun and energetic dance.)
Réitíonn Ricky agus Boo clós súgartha den scoth. (Ricky and Boo create a great playground.)
Beidh cúnamh ag teastáil ó Ricky inniu! (Today, Ricky wants to get help from Dino-Man!)
Beidh Ricky ag tabhairt aire d'fhéileacán inniu. (Today, Ricky tries to look after a butterfly!)
Tuigeann na Singalings gur maith an rud é a bheith ag athchúrsáil agus go bhfuil píosa spraoi ann freisin! (The Singalings know that recycling is good to do and fun too!)

Rachaidh an Cat, Nic agus Sailí ar eachtra sa samhraidh. (The Cat takes Nick and Sally on a summer adventure!)
Téann Melody agus Bop chuig an margadh agus tá neart ar díol ag na stainníní éagsúla. (Melody and Bop are in the market where there are stalls selling lots of different things.)
Téann rang Zak ar thuras scoile chuig feirm agus is cosúil gur meannán ar an bhfeirm a bheidh acu don lón. (The class visit an educational farm.)
Tá aireagán eitilte, a bhfuil ceamara rúnda air, déanta ag Pádraig. (Pádraig has invented a radio-controlled fly kit with an in-built video camera.)
Ní bhíonn cead ag aon duine dul ag sciáil ar nuair a fheictear yeti thart ar Shliabh Rocky Tocky! (Skiing at the Rocky Tocky Mountains is cancelled after a yeti is spotted!)
Tagann Shani agus a cairde ar tairseach go domhan ceolmhar. (Shani and her friends discover a portal to a musical pocket world.)
Tá Mamó ag caitheamh an oíche tigh Pocket ach níl sí in ann titim ina codladh gan a tae. (Grandma is staying over at the Pocket household, but she can't sleep without her tea.)
Tógann Taffy áit chat ríoga trí thimpiste. (Taffy accidentally takes the place of a royal cat.)
Buaicphointí ó chluichí CLG an deireadh seachtaine cluichí ceannais na sraitheanna Allianz san áireamh.(Highlights of the weekend's GAA action including the Allianz league finals.)
Táthar ag athrú spóirt do Underdogs TG4 agus anois beifear ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Shacar na mBan! (The goalposts have shifted for TG4 Underdogs as they tackle Women's Soccer!)

programmes.show_name: Scannán: The Remains of the Day
programmes.show_description: Bíonn sé rómhall nuair thuigeann buitléir nach raibh a dhilseacht tuillte ag fear an tí. (A butler realizes too late how misguided his loyalty was to his employer.)
